requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220-230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F Plug Environment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220-230 V / 50 Hz，C/F型插头环境
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220-230 V / 50 Hz，C/F型插頭環境

summary.en: Ethiopia operates on 220-230 V / 50 Hz mains supply. The predominant plug types in modern buildings are Type C (Europlug, two round pins) and Type F (Schuko, two round pins with grounding clips), with some Type D and Type L sockets in older infrastructure. Electrical safety for wireless and IoT devices must comply with ES standards adopted from IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 frameworks. Compliance evidence must be submitted as part of the ECA type approval application. CE marking (Low Voltage Directive) and CCC are not directly recognised; ES-aligned testing from an accredited laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚使用220-230 V / 50 Hz电网供电。现代建筑中主要使用C型（欧标双圆头）和F型（德标双圆头带接地夹）插头，旧设施中部分使用D型和L型插座。无线及物联网设备的电气安全须符合ES采用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1框架的相关标准。合规证据须作为ECA型式批准申请的组成部分提交。CE标志（低压指令）和CCC不被直接认可，须由经认可实验室提供符合ES标准的检测。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞使用220-230 V / 50 Hz電網供電。現代建築中主要使用C型（歐標雙圓頭）和F型（德標雙圓頭帶接地夾）插頭，舊設施中部分使用D型和L型插座。無線及物聯網裝置的電氣安全須符合ES採用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1框架的相關標準。合規證據須作為ECA型式批准申請的組成部分提交。CE標誌（低壓指令）和CCC不被直接認可，須由經認可實驗室提供符合ES標準的檢測。

standards_or_laws: ES electrical safety standards — IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 aligned
Ethiopia mains supply: 220-230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F plug (IEC 60083 region)

summary.en: China operates on 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I (AS/NZS 3112 variant) and Type A plugs. CCC certification covers electrical safety for many product categories against GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) and related GB standards. The voltage is technically compatible (both 220-230 V / 50 Hz), but plug types differ — China Type I/A plugs are not compatible with Ethiopian Type C/F sockets. Adapters or local plug configurations are required.
summary.zh: 中国使用220 V / 50 Hz电网，采用I型（AS/NZS 3112变体）和A型插头。CCC认证涵盖多类产品依据GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1一致）及相关GB标准的电气安全。电压技术上兼容（均为220-230 V / 50 Hz），但插头类型不同——中国I型/A型插头与埃塞俄比亚C/F型插座不兼容，须使用转接头或采用当地插头配置。
summary.zht: 中國使用220 V / 50 Hz電網，採用I型（AS/NZS 3112變體）和A型插頭。CCC認證涵蓋多類產品依據GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1一致）及相關GB標準的電氣安全。電壓技術上相容（均為220-230 V / 50 Hz），但插頭類型不同——中國I型/A型插頭與衣索比亞C/F型插座不相容，須使用轉接頭或採用當地插頭配置。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of Audio/Video and IT Equipment (China, IEC 62368-1 aligned)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — electrical safety scope (China)

gap.en: CE (LVD) and CCC electrical safety certifications are not directly accepted by ES or ECA. ES-aligned electrical safety testing from an accredited laboratory is required. Physical plug type gap: China Type I/A plugs are incompatible with Ethiopian Type C/F sockets — products must be supplied with Type C or F plugs or universal adapters for Ethiopia. Mains voltage (220-230 V / 50 Hz) is technically compatible between China and Ethiopia.
gap.zh: CE（低压指令）和CCC电气安全认证不被ES或ECA直接接受，须由经认可实验室提供符合ES标准的电气安全检测。插头类型存在差距：中国I型/A型插头与埃塞俄比亚C/F型插座不兼容，产品须配备C型或F型插头或通用转接头。电网电压（220-230 V / 50 Hz）在中国与埃塞俄比亚之间技术上兼容。
gap.zht: CE（低壓指令）和CCC電氣安全認證不被ES或ECA直接接受，須由經認可實驗室提供符合ES標準的電氣安全檢測。插頭類型存在差距：中國I型/A型插頭與衣索比亞C/F型插座不相容，產品須配備C型或F型插頭或通用轉接頭。電網電壓（220-230 V / 50 Hz）在中國與衣索比亞之間技術上相容。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance against ES/IEC-aligned standards is required for Ethiopia market entry. CE (LVD) and CCC are not accepted. Products must also be supplied with Type C or F plugs compatible with Ethiopia's 220-230 V / 50 Hz infrastructure. Re-testing at an accredited laboratory is typically required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入埃塞俄比亚市场须符合ES/IEC一致标准的电气安全合规要求。CE（低压指令）和CCC不被接受。产品还须配备与埃塞俄比亚220-230 V / 50 Hz基础设施兼容的C型或F型插头。通常须在经认可实验室重新检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入衣索比亞市場須符合ES/IEC一致標準的電氣安全合規要求。CE（低壓指令）和CCC不被接受。產品還須配備與衣索比亞220-230 V / 50 Hz基礎設施相容的C型或F型插頭。通常須在經認可實驗室重新檢測。
